stemHtml: An aircraft is approved for RNP APCH. Will this mean that it is automatically approved for RNP 2? Why?

options.a: Yes, because RNP 2 is less stringent, so it is automatically included under any stricter approvals.
options.b: No, because an aircraft can either be approved for RNP 2 or RNP APCH, but it can never be approved for both.
options.c: No, because the aircraft may not meet all requirements for RNP 2 approval.
options.d: Yes, because the navigation databases are the same for all RNP flights.
